case_title: GIANT RECRUITING, LLC. VS. SANGER SACREMENTO STREET, LP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2019 AT 8:30 AM - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-23-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED.
